allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output \("HTTP " + $r.StatusCode + " — server is UP. Page bytes: " + $r.Content.Length\) } catch { Write-Output \("Not responding: " + $_.Exception.Message\) })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 180; Write-Output \("home -> HTTP " + $r.StatusCode + "  CSS: " + \($r.Content -match "/_next/static/css"\) + "  products: " + \($r.Content -match "Gulbagh"\)\) } catch { Write-Output \("ERR " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
